chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5426 of 2024 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3971/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.10 & 22. 3. For orders on CMA No.24402/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Mr. Sadaruddin Buriro, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. 23 petitioners have filed this petition seeking appointment in the education department on the basis of some competitive process having been concluded in the year 2012. Prima facie, this petition is barred by laches, hence, hereby dismissed in limine alongwith pending applications. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
